content.json:
## 版歴

| 版数 | 日付 | 変更内容 |
|---|---|---|
| 1.0 | 2026-06-23 | 初版作成（PIM 監査履歴の可視化） |
| 1.1 | 2026-06-23 | GroupManagement 分析（円グラフ4種）を追加、監査履歴の絞り込み用パラメータ（ActivityDisplayName / ResourceName / Group / Result）を追加 |
| 1.2 | 2026-07-14 | 監査履歴を Category 別に3つの表へ再設計（RoleManagement / GroupManagement / ResourceManagement）、列を日本語ラベル化 |
| 1.3 | 2026-07-14 | Category を単一選択プルダウンに変更し、選択したカテゴリの表のみ表示 |
| 1.4 | 2026-07-14 | request approved イベントに「承認対象ユーザー」列を追加し、承認者と承認対象ユーザーを区別して表示 |
| 1.5 | 2026-07-14 | RoleManagement / ResourceManagement Analysis を追加、分析グラフを Category で切替表示 |

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "GroupManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName has "completed (PIM activation)"
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize GroupName = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Other" and isnotempty(tostring(tr.["displayName"])))
)
| where isnotempty(GroupName)
| summarize ActivationCount = count() by GroupName
| order by ActivationCount desc
| render piechart
content.title: GroupManagement - Most Activated Groups

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "GroupManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName has "completed (PIM activation)"
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize Requestor = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "User")
)
| where isnotempty(Requestor)
| summarize RequestCount = count() by Requestor
| order by RequestCount desc
| render piechart
content.title: GroupManagement - Top Requesting Users

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "GroupManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"]))
| summarize ActivityCount = count() by ActivityDisplayName
| order by ActivityCount desc
| render piechart
content.title: GroupManagement - Activity Type Breakdown

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "GroupManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName has "request approved"
| summarize ApprovalCount = count() by Approver = Identity
| where isnotempty(Approver)
| order by ApprovalCount desc
| render piechart
content.title: GroupManagement - Top Approvers

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "ResourceManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName has "completed (PIM activation)"
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize ResourceScope = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) in ("Subscription","ResourceGroup","Resource") and isnotempty(tostring(tr.["displayName"])))
)
| where isnotempty(ResourceScope)
| summarize ActivationCount = count() by ResourceScope
| order by ActivationCount desc

parameters.name: ActivityDisplayName
parameters.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"]))
| distinct ActivityDisplayName
| order by ActivityDisplayName asc

parameters.name: ResourceName
parameters.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "ResourceManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"]))
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize ResourceScope = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) in ("Subscription","ResourceGroup","Resource") and isnotempty(tostring(tr.["displayName"])))
)
| where isnotempty(ResourceScope)
| distinct ResourceName = ResourceScope
| order by ResourceName asc

parameters.name: Group
parameters.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize GroupTyped = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Group"), GroupOther = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Other" and isnotempty(tostring(tr.["displayName"])))
)
| extend Group = coalesce(GroupTyped, GroupOther, "")
| where isnotempty(Group)
| distinct Group
| order by Group asc

parameters.name: Result
parameters.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| distinct Result
| order by Result asc

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"])) 
| extend PrimaryTarget = TargetResources.[0].["displayName"]
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize GroupTyped = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Group"), GroupOther = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Other" and isnotempty(tostring(tr.["displayName"]))), RoleName = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Role"), DirectoryScope = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Directory"), MemberUser = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "User"), MemberUPN = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["userPrincipalName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "User")
)
| extend Group = coalesce(GroupTyped, GroupOther, "")
| extend Reason = extract(@'"key":"Justification","value":"([^"]+)"*}',1,tostring(AdditionalDetails))
| extend StatusReason = ResultReason
| extend ResourceName = case(
    Category=="RoleManagement",
        iff(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic(["Update role setting in PIM","PIM Alert"])) ,
            iff(TargetResources.[2].["displayName"]=="", TargetResources.[1].["displayName"],TargetResources.[2].["displayName"]),
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Remove member from role (PIM activation expired)",
            coalesce(RoleName, tostring(TargetResources.[0].["displayName"]), ""),
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Add member to role request approved (PIM activation)",coalesce(RoleName, ""),TargetResources.[3].["displayName"]))),
    Category=="GroupManagement",
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Remove member from role (PIM activation expired)",
            coalesce(Group, ""),
        iff(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic ( [ "request approved","request denied"])),TargetResources.[4].["displayName"],coalesce(Group, ""))),
    Category=="ResourceManagement",
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Add member to role request approved (PIM activation)", TargetResources.[4].["displayName"],
        iff(ActivityDisplayName has "Remove member from role completed",TargetResources.[6].["displayName"],
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Update role setting in PIM", TargetResources.[2].["displayName"],TargetResources.[3].["displayName"]
        ))),"")
| extend Scope = case(
    Category=="RoleManagement",
        iff(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic(["PIM alert", "Update role setting in PIM"])),"",
        iff(isnotempty(TargetResources.[5].["displayName"]),TargetResources.[5].["displayName"],
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Update role setting in PIM",TargetResources.[2].["displayName"],
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Remove member from role (PIM activation expired)",
            coalesce(DirectoryScope, ""),
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Add member to role request approved (PIM activation)",coalesce(DirectoryScope, ""),TargetResources.[3].["displayName"]))))),
    Category=="GroupManagement",
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Remove member from role (PIM activation expired)",
            coalesce(DirectoryScope, Group, ""),
        iff(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic ( [ "request approved","request denied"])),TargetResources.[4].["displayName"],coalesce(Group, ""))),
    Category=="ResourceManagement",
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Add member to role request approved (PIM activation)", TargetResources.[4].["displayName"],
        iff(ActivityDisplayName has "Remove member from role completed",TargetResources.[6].["displayName"],
        iff(ActivityDisplayName == "Update role setting in PIM", TargetResources.[2].["displayName"],TargetResources.[3].["displayName"]
        ))),"")
| extend Subject = 
    iif(Category=="GroupManagement" and ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic (["requested (PIM activation)","completed (PIM activation)"])),
        iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(coalesce(MemberUser,""), " <", MemberUPN, ">"), coalesce(MemberUser, "")),
    iif(ActivityDisplayName == "Add member to role request approved (PIM activation)",
        iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(coalesce(MemberUser,""), " <", MemberUPN, ">"), coalesce(MemberUser, "")),
    iif(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic (["request approved","Update role setting in PIM","request denied (PIM activation","PIM alert"])), "", 
    iif(ActivityDisplayName has "(PIM activation expired)",
        iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(coalesce(MemberUser,""), " <", MemberUPN, ">"), coalesce(MemberUser, "")), TargetResources.[2].["displayName"])))) 
| extend Type = 
    iif(Category=="GroupManagement" and ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic (["requested (PIM activation)","completed (PIM activation)"])), "User",
    iif(ActivityDisplayName == "Add member to role request approved (PIM activation)", "User",
    iif(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic (["request approved","Update role setting in PIM","request denied (PIM activation","PIM alert"])), "", 
    iif(ActivityDisplayName has "(PIM activation expired)",
        iff(isnotempty(MemberUser), "User", TargetResources.[2].["type"]), TargetResources.[2].["type"])))) 
| extend StartTime = todatetime(extract(@'"key":"StartTime","value":"([^"]+)"*}',1,tostring(AdditionalDetails)))
| extend ExpireTime = todatetime(extract(@'"key":"ExpirationTime","value":"([^"]+)"*}',1,tostring(AdditionalDetails)))
| extend EntraRole = coalesce(RoleName, "")
| extend ApprovedUser = iff(ActivityDisplayName has "request approved", iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(coalesce(MemberUser,""), " <", MemberUPN, ">"), coalesce(MemberUser,"")), "")
| extend Requestor = iff(ActivityDisplayName has "request approved", Identity, iff(isnotempty(MemberUser), iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(MemberUser, " <", MemberUPN, ">"), MemberUser), Identity))
| where Category == "RoleManagement"
| where array_length(dynamic([{ActivityDisplayName}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{ActivityDisplayName}]), ActivityDisplayName)
| where array_length(dynamic([{Result}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{Result}]), Result)
| project ActivityDateTime, Requestor, EntraRole, ApprovedUser, ActivityDisplayName, Result, Reason
| order by ActivityDateTime desc
content.title: RoleManagement 昇格監査履歴

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "GroupManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"]))
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize GroupTyped = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Group"), GroupOther = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Other" and isnotempty(tostring(tr.["displayName"]))), MemberUser = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "User"), MemberUPN = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["userPrincipalName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "User")
)
| extend EntraGroup = coalesce(GroupTyped, GroupOther, "")
| extend ApprovedUser = iff(ActivityDisplayName has "request approved", iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(coalesce(MemberUser,""), " <", MemberUPN, ">"), coalesce(MemberUser,"")), "")
| extend Requestor = iff(ActivityDisplayName has "request approved", Identity, iff(isnotempty(MemberUser), iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(MemberUser, " <", MemberUPN, ">"), MemberUser), Identity))
| extend Reason = extract(@'"key":"Justification","value":"([^"]+)"*}',1,tostring(AdditionalDetails))
| where array_length(dynamic([{ActivityDisplayName}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{ActivityDisplayName}]), ActivityDisplayName)
| where array_length(dynamic([{Group}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{Group}]), EntraGroup) or isempty(EntraGroup)
| where array_length(dynamic([{Result}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{Result}]), Result)
| project ActivityDateTime, Requestor, EntraGroup, ApprovedUser, ActivityDisplayName, Result, Reason
| order by ActivityDateTime desc
content.title: GroupManagement 昇格監査履歴

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where Category == "ResourceManagement"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"]))
| mv-apply tr = TargetResources on (
    summarize ResourceScope = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) in ("Subscription","ResourceGroup","Resource") and isnotempty(tostring(tr.["displayName"]))), AzureRoleName = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "Role"), MemberUser = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["displayName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "User"), MemberUPN = take_anyif(tostring(tr.["userPrincipalName"]), tostring(tr.["type"]) == "User")
)
| extend AzureResource = coalesce(ResourceScope, "")
| extend AzureRole = coalesce(AzureRoleName, "")
| extend ApprovedUser = iff(ActivityDisplayName has "request approved", iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(coalesce(MemberUser,""), " <", MemberUPN, ">"), coalesce(MemberUser,"")), "")
| extend Requestor = iff(ActivityDisplayName has "request approved", Identity, iff(isnotempty(MemberUser), iff(isnotempty(MemberUPN), strcat(MemberUser, " <", MemberUPN, ">"), MemberUser), Identity))
| extend Reason = extract(@'"key":"Justification","value":"([^"]+)"*}',1,tostring(AdditionalDetails))
| where array_length(dynamic([{ActivityDisplayName}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{ActivityDisplayName}]), ActivityDisplayName)
| where array_length(dynamic([{ResourceName}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{ResourceName}]), AzureResource) or isempty(AzureResource)
| where array_length(dynamic([{Result}])) == 0 or set_has_element(dynamic([{Result}]), Result)
| project ActivityDateTime, Requestor, AzureResource, AzureRole, ApprovedUser, ActivityDisplayName, Result, Reason
| order by ActivityDateTime desc
content.title: ResourceManagement 昇格監査履歴

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"])) 
| summarize count() by Category
| render piechart
content.title: Category Percentage

content.query:
let Start = startofday(ago(30d));
let End = startofday(now());
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM","PIM policy removed"])) 
| summarize count() by bin(ActivityDateTime, 1d), Category
| union (
    range Category from 1 to 1 step 1
    | mv-expand  ActivityDateTime=range(Start, End, 1d) to typeof(datetime)
    | mv-expand Category=dynamic(["RoleManagement","GroupManagement","ResourceManagement"]) to typeof(string)
    | extend count_=0
    )
| order by ActivityDateTime
| render timechart
content.title: Daily Activity Transition (Recently 30 day)

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where ActivityDisplayName !in (dynamic(["Resource updated","Onboarded resource to PIM"])) 
| extend ActivityType = iff(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic(["approval requested","role requested"])), "requested", 
    iff(ActivityDisplayName has_any (dynamic(["approved ","denied"])),"approved/denied", ""))
| project ActivityDateTime, Identity, ActivityDisplayName, Category, ActivityType
| where ActivityType != ""
| summarize count() by Identity, Category, ActivityType
content.title: Activity Type Summary

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where LoggedByService == "PIM"
| where ActivityDisplayName has "PIM alert"
| extend PrimaryTarget = TargetResources.[0].["displayName"]
| project ActivityDateTime, Identity, ActivityDisplayName, PrimaryTarget, Category
| order by ActivityDateTime desc
content.title: PIM Alert Activity
